template: {  "title": "The Glass Doppelgänger",  "description": "A high-octane psychological thriller scene where a woman is engaged in a visceral physical combat with her own sentient reflection emerging from a shattered surface.",  "prompt": "You will perform an image edit using the provided photo to create a high-budget movie frame.
